testcase.name: test_member_registration_duplicate_email

failure.message: sqlalchemy.exc.InterfaceError: (sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql.asyncpg.InterfaceError) <class 'asyncpg.exceptions._base.InterfaceError'>: cannot perform operation: another operation is in progress [SQL: SELECT tenants.id, tenants.name, tenants.slug, tenants.domain, tenants.contact_person, tenants.contact_email, tenants.contact_number, tenants.whatsapp_number, tenants.address, tenants.pin, tenants.upi_id, tenants.castes, tenants.plan, tenants.max_users, tenants.max_admins, tenants.can_override_plan_prices, tenants.logo_key, tenants.is_active, tenants.trial_ends_at, tenants.created_at, tenants.updated_at FROM tenants WHERE tenants.id = $1::UUID AND tenants.is_active = true] [parameters: (UUID('b584d05b-f47c-4508-937e-ada267c02745'),)] (Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/rvf5)

testcase.failure:
.venv\Lib\site-packages\sqlalchemy\dialects\postgresql\asyncpg.py:840: in _start_transaction await self._transaction.start() .venv\Lib\site-packages\asyncpg\transaction.py:146: in start await self._connection.execute(query) .venv\Lib\site-packages\asyncpg\connection.py:350: in execute result = await self._protocol.query(query, timeout) asyncpg\protocol\protocol.pyx:359: in query ??? asyncpg\protocol\protocol.pyx:744: in asyncpg.protocol.protocol.BaseProtocol._check_state ???
